## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -r build && pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm -r test` pass
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs / CHANGELOG if user-facing
- [ ] No secrets, keys, or private/internal paths committed
